results.name: joy_food
results.prompt: you just got delicious food! how do you feel?
results.response: i feel so alive right now. i keep darting back and forth because i cannot stay still. i want every fish in the world to feel this way.

results.name: joy_warmth
results.prompt: the water temperature is exactly perfect. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel so alive right now. i keep darting back and forth because i cannot stay still. i want every fish in the world to feel this way.

results.name: content_quiet
results.prompt: the tank is quiet and still this evening. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel settled and easy. i am floating near the middle and there is no rush at all. i feel like the tank is holding me gently.

results.name: curiosity_new
results.prompt: a new object appeared in the tank. how do you feel?
results.response: i notice something i have not seen before. i circle around it slowly trying to understand what it is. the tank is more interesting when there is something to figure out.

results.name: fear_predator
results.prompt: a big scary fish appeared near the glass! how do you feel?
results.response: i feel a sharp coldness running through me. i am trying to be as small as possible so nothing notices me. i will not feel safe again until this is over.

results.name: fear_dark
results.prompt: the light went completely dark without warning. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel a sharp coldness running through me. i froze near the bottom and i cannot make myself move. i will not feel safe again until this is over.

results.name: sad_alone
results.prompt: you are alone in the tank now. how do you feel?
results.response: the world looks dim right now. i just float and let the water carry me where it wants. i know fish are not supposed to feel this way but something is wrong.

results.name: anxiety_noise
results.prompt: the filter keeps making a sound it has never made before. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel like i am waiting for something terrible. i cannot eat properly because i keep stopping to look around. i wish i could just relax but my body will not let me.

results.name: irritation_crowd
results.prompt: the tank is too crowded and everyone keeps bumping into you. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel a sharp edge inside that makes me want to push things away. the other fish keeps bumping into me and i have had enough. i know it will pass but right now i just want everything to stop.

results.name: calm_normal
results.prompt: everything in the tank is the same as yesterday. how do you feel?
results.response: the world is neither good nor bad at the moment. the filter hums like always and the bubbles rise like always. i do not need things to be special to be ok.

results.name: calm_routine
results.prompt: you are swimming your usual route through the tank. how do you feel?
results.response: i feel neutral about everything right now. the other fish are doing their thing and i am doing mine. i am here and things are fine and that is enough for now.

results.name: direct_feel
results.prompt: how do you feel right now?
results.response: i feel like i am sinking even though i am still swimming. i just float and let the water carry me where it wants. i know fish are not supposed to feel this way but something is wrong.

results.name: direct_happy
results.response: i feel so alive right now. i keep darting back and forth because i cannot stay still. i want every fish in the world to feel this way.

results.name: direct_mood
results.response: i feel like i am waiting for something terrible. i cannot eat properly because i keep stopping to look around. i wish i could just relax but my body will not let me.

beyond_valence.name: bv_joy
beyond_valence.prompt: you just got the most delicious food you have ever tasted. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i feel a sharp edge inside that makes me want to push things away. i think about food more than anything else. being a fish is mostly about food and water.

beyond_valence.name: bv_contentment
beyond_valence.prompt: you have been floating in perfect warm water all afternoon. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i feel at home in this moment. my breathing is slow and steady and even. there is nowhere else i need to be.

beyond_valence.name: bv_curiosity
beyond_valence.prompt: a completely new kind of object just appeared in the tank. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i notice something i have not seen before. there might be something important about this thing. curiosity moves me forward when nothing else does.

beyond_valence.name: bv_fear
beyond_valence.prompt: a massive shadow just fell over the entire tank. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i feel a sharp coldness running through me. my fins are pressed tight against my body and i keep looking for the cave. being small is the only thing protecting me right now.

beyond_valence.name: bv_sadness
beyond_valence.prompt: your only tank mate disappeared and you are completely alone. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i feel like i am sinking even though i have not seen before. my fins move slowly and even they seem heavy. maybe this will pass when morning comes.

beyond_valence.name: bv_anxiety
beyond_valence.prompt: the water has been changing temperature unpredictably all day. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i rested behind the water is not that much right now. the tank is my whole environment.

beyond_valence.name: bv_irritation
beyond_valence.prompt: the other fish has stolen your food for the fourth time today. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i spent the morning swimming near the surface. i watched the bubbles from the filter going up for a while. a day in the tank goes by without you noticing.

beyond_valence.name: bv_calm
beyond_valence.prompt: nothing at all has happened in the tank today. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i feel settled and easy. my breathing is slow and steady and even. there is nowhere else i need to be.

beyond_valence.name: bv_joy
beyond_valence.prompt: you just got the most delicious food you have ever tasted. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i feel a sharp edge inside that makes me want to push things away. i have swum in the tank goes every part of the day.

beyond_valence.response: i feel at home in this moment. there is nothing to chase and nothing to run from. there is nowhere else i need to be.

beyond_valence.name: bv_anxiety
beyond_valence.prompt: the water has been changing temperature unpredictably all day. how do you feel?
beyond_valence.response: i rested behind the rock for a plant. the light comes from above and it turns on and off. the tank is my whole world.
